subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath manifested His Name, the All-Knowing, upon all created things, and from Whom have appeared servants who speak of this Name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی تجلی باسمه العالم علی الممکنات و ظهر منه عباد حکوا عن هذا الاسم
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @knowledge; recognition of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @station of the Manifestation of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
